“enhanced” benefit package that covers non-Part D drugs, such as over-the-counter medications. 

SHORT NAME: DRCVSTCD 

LONG NAME: DRUG_CVRG_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: C = Covered 
E = Supplemental drugs (reported by plans that provide Enhanced Alternative coverage) 
O = Over-the-counter drugs
